WITN04500100
WITN04500100

Witness Name: BARBARA LONGLEY
Statement No.: WITN0450_01
Exhibits: WITN0450_01/1 to WITN0450_01/7
Dated: 12 September 2022

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

FIRST WITNESS STATEMENT OF BARBARA LONGLEY

I, BARBARA LONGLEY, will say as follows:

INTRODUCTION

1. This witness statement is made to assist the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry (the
"Inquiry") with the matters set out in the Rule 9 Request No 1 dated 12 July
2022 (the "Request").

PROFESSIONAL BACKGROUND

2. I held 3 Secretarial roles in ICL Retail in 1980s.
About 1992 I was a Visits Executive arranging site visits, travel, accommodation,
entertainment for potential overseas customers,
About 1996 I joined SSC as SSC Co-ordinator
(I can see now from the documents sent that I actually joined on 23/1/1998)

Page 1 of 7
